description: i have an issue with my plumbing

conversation_history.message: Hello John Tenant. We are delighted to have you at Spandauer Damm 10-22, 14059 Berlin, Germany. How can I assist you today?
i have an issue with my plumbing

I'm sorry to hear you're having trouble with your plumbing, John. To help me get the right person to assist you, could you please describe the specific issue? For example, is it a leak, a clogged drain, or a problem with water pressure?
its a water pressure problem with my shower head, there is barely enough pressure to take a proper bath

I'm sorry to hear you're having trouble with your shower's water pressure, John. To help me coordinate the right repair, could you please let me know if this is happening in other faucets throughout your apartment as well, or is it isolated just to the shower?
Isolated to the shower only, can you contact the property manager and relevant party?

I'm sorry to hear you're having trouble with your shower. To make sure I get the right person out to help, could you please clarify if this is a leak, a clog, or an issue with the water temperature/pressure?
